extracted.title: AGT Customer Specific Operational Flow Order
extracted.description: Algonquin Gas Transmission LLC (AGT) has limited operational flexibility to manage imbalances. Therefore, in order to maintain the operational integrity of the system, AGT is issuing an Operational Flow Order (OFO) pursuant to Section 26 of the General Terms and Conditions of AGT's FERC Gas Tariff, effective 9:00 AM CCT, February 21, 2026, for certain delivery point parties on the AGT system. AGT will be contacting the affected parties. This OFO does not affect the ability of AGT to receive or deliver quantities of gas for scheduled nominations to any customer or pipeline. During the effectiveness of this OFO, all parties must be balanced. The penalty shall apply to each dekatherm of actual quantities that exceeds the greater of 500 Dth or 95% of scheduled quantities for Due Shipper balances, as well as each dekatherm of scheduled quantities that exceeds the greater of 500 Dth or 110% of actual quantities for Due Pipe balances. The penalty will be equal to three times the arithmetic average of daily Platts Gas Daily "Daily Price Survey" posting for the High Common price for "Algonquin, city-gates" for the day on which such violation occurred as indicated in AGT's General Terms and Conditions Section 26.8. In addition, AGT will not permit retroactive nominations to avoid an OFO penalty except for primary firm no-notice nominations or shippers who can secure day ending Due Shipper supply for Due Pipe imbalances and Due Pipe supply for Due Shipper imbalances. This Customer Specific Operational Flow Order will remain in effect until further notice. Please contact your Operations Account Representative should you have any questions. Please refer to the table below for the effected AGT operational areas, dates, and tolerance percentages: NOTE: Deliveries No DP : Shippers are not to take more than scheduled Deliveries No DS : Shippers are not to take less than scheduled Receipts No DP : Shippers are not to give less than scheduled Receipts No DS : Shippers are not to give more than scheduled
